title: Slabs to Blocks: Biomes O' Plenty
description: A mod that adds crafting recipes for making Biomes O' Plenty's slabs back into their block variants.
body:
NOTE FOR 1.20.x: Download polymorph because of conflict of recipes of what the BOP dev intended vs what I intended.
NOTE FOR 1.20.1+: Don't expect for all slabs to have recipes, count yourself lucky if all of them do.

This preconfigured mod lets you craft your unused slabs from the Biomes O' Plenty mod back into their block variants, allowing you to not go through any config tabs to make the recipes yourself! All you need to do is simply place two slabs on top of each other in the crafting table!

![Cherry Slabs being crafting back into Cherry Planks(removed in 1.20 due to Cherry Wood being in minecraft by default)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0ba75772e7f8013ce264dca7383951277d94b78.png)
